candidates.why: Component of revenue but not the total; better to use the explicit total revenue line.
Component of revenue but not the aggregate top-line.
Explicit total revenue line aggregating passenger, ancillary, freight and other revenue; best representation of top-line revenue.
This is an operating expense, not revenue.
Component of total revenue, not the top-line itself.
Technical balancing line rather than an economic revenue measure.

variables.notes: Use the explicit total revenue line as primary REVT; other revenue lines are components.

candidates.why: Although on the balance sheet (inventory), it most closely reflects consumable parts used in operations and is the only available proxy for direct production costs among candidates.

variables.notes: No explicit COGS/Cost of sales line in candidates; use Consumables as the best available proxy given constraints.

candidates.why: Clearly an operating overhead cost for personnel, fits SG&A definition and is not labeled as COGS or D&A.
Explicitly SG&A-related stock-based compensation; classic SG&A component.
Bucket of operating overhead expenses; suitable SG&A component (not a total line).
More detailed/net presentation of other operating expenses; still an overhead component, not a total line.
Personnel-related overhead expense, part of SG&A when not classified in COGS.
Form of stock-based compensation for employees; typically part of SG&A.
Personnel overhead related to crew; treated as SG&A-type operating expense rather than direct COGS within given options.

variables.notes: Multiple SG&A components selected as instructed; none are totals or balancing items, and depreciation/impairment lines are excluded.
No R&D-related candidates were provided; treat XRD as missing/zero.

candidates.why: Primary gross interest expense line; best single representation of interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Interest expense specifically related to lease liabilities; useful fallback if main interest expense line is missing for some years.
Residual interest expense component; appropriate as a further fallback.
Represents minority interests, not interest on debt; should not be used for XINT.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental disclosure of lease-related interest; good final fallback for interest expense.
Equity item, not interest expense.
Equity item, not interest expense.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental

variables.notes: Priority list ordered from main interest expense to more specific/supplemental components; minority interest lines excluded as they are equity, not interest.

candidates.why: Represents shareholders’ equity; good proxy for book equity, but there is also an explicit total equity line.
Component of equity, not the full equity balance.
Component of paid-in capital; not total equity.
Explicit total equity figure including all components; best choice for book equity.
Technical balancing line, not an economic equity measure.
Technical balancing line, not the substantive equity figure.

candidates.row_label: Balancing Item - Total Liability and Equity
candidates.why: Balancing artifact for the whole balance sheet, not equity itself.
Represents total assets/liabilities plus equity; not pure equity.

variables.notes: Use Total equity as primary BE; Shareholders equity as a backup label across years.

candidates.why: Income statement allocation of profit to non-controlling interests (flow), not the balance sheet stock, but indicates presence of minorities.
OCI component related to minorities; not the main minority interest balance.
Balance sheet line representing the stock of non-controlling interests; best choice for minority interest (MIB).
Alternative label for non-controlling interests on the balance sheet; good backup if primary line is unused in some years.
Income statement item, not the balance sheet amount; less suitable than BS lines for MIB.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income - Attributable to Minority Interest - Total
candidates.why: OCI-related flow attributable to minorities; not the stock measure of minority interest.

variables.notes: Use balance sheet minority interest lines to capture MIB; income statement and OCI items are flows rather than the equity stock.
